movesList.name: Double Flame Strike
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, Dn, TD, To, Dn

movesList.name: Power Kick
movesList.input: tap Aw, To, Y or Z

movesList.name: Firestorm
movesList.input: hold B or C, Up, TU, Dn

movesList.name: Gut-Slash
movesList.input: Aw, AD, Dn, TD, To, push B or C

movesList.name: Tarok Strike
movesList.input: hold B or C, AD, Dn, TD, To

movesList.name: Heart Strike
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, tap Up, Up, Dn

movesList.name: Elbow Smash
movesList.input: tap To, To + B or C

movesList.name: 360 Flame Strike
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, To, Up, TU

movesList.name: Power Push
movesList.input: To, TD, Dn, AD, push Y or Z

movesList.name: Knee Tarok
movesList.input: To, AD, Dn, TD, To, push C

movesList.name: Power Deflect
movesList.input: hold B or C, To, TD, Dn, AD
